title: Scary & Classic
description: Scary & Classic revives the classic Minecraft experience, while maintaining modern content with a twist.... It's scary!
body:
**Scary & Classic** 

A modpack that revives the nostalgic feel of classic Minecraft, while introducing eerie but simple horror elements in the familiar style of classic Minecraft. This pack is made for players who love the simplicity and charm of old-school Minecraft but with an extra scary twist.

Scary & Classic aims to strike a delicate balance between retro aesthetics, modern gameplay, and psychological horror. You’ll notice the old textures, menus, and visual details that call back to the Alpha and Beta days, but once night falls... the game changes.

**⚙️ Performance First**

This pack is optimized to run smoothly on a wide range of systems, with performance-focused mods like:

    Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight for rendering and lighting speed

    FerriteCore, Entity Culling, and More Culling for memory efficiency

    ModernFix, Indium, Concurrent Chunk Management Engine, and ImmediatelyFast for enhanced multithreading and FPS stability

**🎧 Immersion Overhaul**

With mods like Analog Horror Minecraft Music, and Immersive Thunder, the soundscape becomes deeply reactive and atmospheric. You will never feel truly alone.

Whether you want to relive the glory days of classic Minecraft or test your bravery in a more unsettling version of the Overworld, Scary & Classic delivers a refreshingly nostalgic yet spine-tingling survival experience.
